testcase.name: TC07

failure.message: Message should be displayed as expected expected [Thank you for registering your account] but found [Please fill the form below to create a new account or login if you already have one. If you already created an account but haven't confirmed it yet, go here and enter the confirmation code which can be found in your email. Please make sure your PID/Passport Number is correct. It can't be changed.]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Message should be displayed as expected expected [Thank you for registering your account] but found [Please fill the form below to create a new account or login if you already have one. If you already created an account but haven't confirmed it yet, go here and enter the confirmation code which can be found in your email. Please make sure your PID/Passport Number is correct. It can't be changed.] at testcases.Railway.RegisterTests.TC07(RegisterTests.java:46) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1541) at com.intellij.rt.testng.IDEARemoteTestNG.run(IDEARemoteTestNG.java:65) at com.intellij.rt.testng.RemoteTestNGStarter.main(RemoteTestNGStarter.java:105) ... Removed 29 stack frames
